parameters.name: pulse_width
parameters.override_behavior: sets output high duration after each qualifying crossing

parameters.name: sigcrossing
parameters.override_behavior: sets the bidirectional sigin detection threshold

modeling_constraints: Use bidirectional threshold crossing detection and timer-controlled pulse state.
Drive sigout with a smoothed voltage contribution using the public timing parameters.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: A rising sigin crossing through sigcrossing initiates a sigout pulse.
A falling sigin crossing through sigcrossing also initiates a sigout pulse.
After each qualifying crossing, the output target remains at vlogic_high for pulse_width before returning to vlogic_low.
Sigout returns to vlogic_low between sufficiently separated threshold crossings.
Alternating rising and falling crossings each produce corresponding pulses rather than only the first event or one polarity.
Sigout changes use tdel delay with trise and tfall smoothing.

title: Crossing Pulse Detector
